notes.title: React Performance Optimization
notes.content: To improve React performance, consider memoization using React.memo and useMemo, lazy loading components, and avoiding unnecessary re-renders with proper key usage. Profile with React DevTools for bottlenecks.

notes.title: Japan Travel Planning
notes.content: Plan to visit Tokyo, Kyoto, and Osaka. Book JR Pass in advance. Try local ramen shops and book ryokan stays for authentic experiences. Travel in spring for cherry blossoms.

notes.title: Favorite Pasta Recipes
notes.content:
1. Spaghetti Aglio e Olio: garlic, olive oil, chili flakes.
2. Creamy Mushroom Fettuccine: heavy cream, parmesan, portobello.
3. Pesto Penne: fresh basil, pine nuts, olive oil.

notes.title: Weekly Workout Plan
notes.content:
Mon: Upper body strength
Tue: HIIT cardio
Wed: Lower body strength
Thu: Yoga
Fri: Full-body circuit
Sat: Rest or light walk
Sun: Core and flexibility

notes.title: Meal Prep Ideas
notes.content:
1. Grilled chicken with quinoa and steamed veggies.
2. Overnight oats with berries.
3. Mason jar salads with chickpeas.
4. Sweet potato and black bean burritos.

notes.title: Reading List
notes.content:
1. 'Atomic Habits' by James Clear
2. 'The Pragmatic Programmer' by Hunt & Thomas
3. 'Kafka on the Shore' by Haruki Murakami

notes.title: Fitness Goals 2025
notes.content:
1. Run a half-marathon by September.
2. Achieve 10 pull-ups unassisted.
3. Reduce body fat by 5%.
4. Build a consistent 4-day workout habit.
5. Track macros weekly.

notes.title: TypeScript Migration Guide
notes.content:
Steps to migrate:
1. Rename files to .tsx/.ts.
2. Add tsconfig.json with strict mode.
3. Define types for props and states.
4. Use interfaces instead of propTypes.
5. Fix type errors incrementally.

notes.content:
